title: Manufacturing Engineer - Microtek International - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Microtek International - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Microtek International in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Microtek International:
Microtek International is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microtek International!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
